description_long: This chest of drawers features a robust rectangular form with a dark, richly grained wood finish, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The front is organized into nine drawers of varying sizes, each equipped with sleek, metallic bar pull handles that contrast elegantly with the wood. The sides and back are constructed from the same wood material, with the back panel displaying a patchwork of wood grain patterns. The base is supported by a black frame that extends slightly beyond the body, providing both stability and a subtle decorative accent. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. No visible locks or decorative embellishments are present, emphasizing a clean, functional design.
description: A dark wood chest of drawers with nine drawers and metallic bar pull handles, supported by a black frame. The design is modern, clean, and functional with a flat top and no visible decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing nine drawers with metallic bar pull handles and a black supporting frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the chest, the wood grain pattern, and the black frame extending to the floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a patchwork wood grain back panel with no handles or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and black frame.
